TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kayu-baliq ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 150 buwan, 359 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 8 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 351 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 1.4%, Amis 0.3%, Puyuma 0.3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kayu-baliq hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kayu-baliq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga Luhung. tay 'zil na Kayu-baliq hya' ga Kzyay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kaju-βaliq ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan *.*%, amis~ɕ *.*%, pujuma *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa luħuŋ. taj ʔzil na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa kzjaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kayu-baliq ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 150 buwan, 359 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 8 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 351 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 1.4%, Amis 0.3%, Puyuma 0.3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kayu-baliq hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kayu-baliq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kayu-baliq hya' ga Luhung. tay 'zil na Kayu-baliq hya' ga Kzyay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kaju-βaliq ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan *.*%, amis~ɕ *.*%, pujuma *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa luħuŋ. taj ʔzil na kaju-βaliq ħjaʔ ɣa kzjaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
